name: Damion Reid
abstract: Damion Reid (born June 16, 1979) is an American drummer. Critics have praised his "controlled fury" and "microscopically complex beats."

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Movie Music of Spike Lee and Terence Blanchard
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Mo' Better Blues: Mo' Better Blues

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: Oh Damion Reid and Vicente Archer. The trio. I go back with them since 2000.
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016
